name: cowalk-marketplace
description: Single-plugin marketplace for codebase-cowalk: chunk-by-chunk codebase walkthroughs in the browser, driven by Claude Code.

plugins.name: codebase-cowalk
plugins.description: Walk through a codebase chunk by chunk in your browser. Claude pushes interactive explanations to a live HTML page so a human can review LLM-generated code without re-reading every line.
